_schema.id: EATK-### — enemy attack card id (distinct namespace from ACT-### player cards)
_schema.suit: spade | club | diamond | heart — for EnemyIntent telegraph coloring + player RPS read
_schema.effects: Same schema as player cards: { type: 'damage'|'defense'|'status'|'heal', value, duration?, status? }
_schema.intentType: High-level telegraph category: BASIC | BRACE | DOT | BURST | CC | DRAIN — raycaster/HUD can use this for glyph hints
_schema.synergyTags: Tag intersection for any future enemy stacking rules (parallel to player synergyTags)
_schema._note: Design intent — why this card exists and which enemies should use it

cards.name: Rend
cards._note: Baseline ♠ strike. Assigned to most cellar grunts as their go-to beat.

cards.name: Gnaw
cards._note: Light bite + 1 dmg/turn bleed for 3 rounds. Rats and hounds open with this.

cards.name: Bone Brace
cards._note: Skeletal enemies use this when HP drops. Turns a round into a bracing read — player must either out-stack or pivot.

cards.name: Crushing Slam
cards._note: Big telegraphed spike. Elite / boss signature. Players must commit defense when they see it.

cards.name: Spore Burst
cards._note: Mold/fungus attackers. 2 dmg + 2 poison/turn x3 — heaviest DoT enemy card.

cards.name: Shock Bite
cards._note: Eels, shock beasts. Stuns player 1 round — skips their next draw. Used sparingly, feels nasty.

cards.name: Ensnare
cards._note: Webs the player. Rooted is currently a visual tag (no tick damage) — foundation for future movement-lock mechanic.

cards.name: Crystal Lance
cards._note: Precise ♦ strike. Foundry constructs. Slightly above baseline because ♦ enemies tend to have fewer moves.

cards.name: Ember Flare
cards._note: Ember sprites, forge creatures. Burning ticks 2 dmg/turn for 2 rounds.

cards.name: Magma Carapace
cards._note: Golems and slag hounds. Bigger brace than Bone Brace to read as ‘this thing is tough.’

cards.name: Blood Drain
cards._note: ♥ signature. Deals damage AND heals enemy. Wraiths, vampiric enemies.

cards.name: Rupture
cards._note: Heavy bleed opener. Bosses and elites that want to pressure a long fight.

cards.name: Feral Swipe
cards._note: Low-HP ‘weak enemy’ baseline strike — rats, imps, small pests.
